rationale: The US-Iran ceasefire/deal remains the dominant story but is still in rhetoric/announcement phase with no signed treaty yet; oil price slide is a mild positive for Polish energy costs, while Russian strikes in Ukraine continue as background.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal announced; oil prices slide
top_events.summary: Peace deal signing expected Friday but not yet enacted — oil falling is a mild positive for Polish energy costs and inflation. No qualitative leap beyond prior cycle.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine in Ukraine, damage historic cathedral
top_events.summary: Continued Russian bombardment of Ukrainian cities — no qualitative escalation beyond established war pattern, but proximity to Poland keeps baseline awareness elevated.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: Major UK-Japan trade deal has limited direct impact on Poland but signals continued Western economic alignment; minor background relevance for EU trade context.
